droply!
How it worksSupported
ZERO WATERMARK*
Your links. Your files.

Save the good stuff.

Paste a public post. Grab the video, image or audio. No sketchy pop-ups, no account, no drama.

TikTokInstagramFacebookTelegram

Ridiculously easy

Paste. Pick. Poof.

Everything runs from this computer. Your links are not stored in a cloud account.

01

Drop the link

Copy a public post URL from your favourite social app.

02

Choose your vibe

Keep the best video, a smaller version, or just the audio.

03

Save it locally

The file lands straight in your Downloads folder.

Private by default. Made for your own network.

Only download media you own or have permission to save. Private, protected and DRM content is not supported. *Watermark removal depends on the source provided by the platform.
